introduction: SYNOPSISIn order to pay for her sister's college tuition, Hyun-hi works at a bar but hates it. Hyun-suk, Hyun-hi's sister, realizes this and tries to get a job at a bar herself but Hyun-hi strongly objects. Right about the time Hyun-hi starts going out with the crooked Mun-hwoi, she runs into the benevolent Chairman Min. One time, after he helps her and leaves, Hyun-hi discovers a wallet with a lot of money in it. She tries to return it but Mun-hwoi takes it and runs away with another woman. Meanwhile, Chairman Min has reported Hyun-hi but Hyun-hi wants to believe in Mun-hwoi to the end. After her release from jail, Hyun-hi sees Hyun-suk pregnant with Mun-hwoi's child. When she discovers him in the arms of another woman, Hyun-hi throws her knife of revenge at him.故事玄熙走到大厅为他上大学的Hyunnsuk妹妹付学费。玄秀注意到这一点，他试图去酒吧，他听到他姐姐的悲伤。玄熙见到一个歪风情人的仪式时会见了一个监禁平民。玄熙出来后发现一个大钱包还给它，但仪式和另一个女孩逃跑了。另一方面，民间罪犯指玄贤和玄熙试图相信诅咒直到最后。我看到爆发后怀孕会众的孩子的玄淑，并且在与另一个女人撒谎的演讲中，插入了复数刀片。
